ValidationRule.description: If Onboarding Status is set to Postponed, corresponding Postponed fields are required.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( AND( NOT($User.ProfileId = '00e1I000001rqxt'), NOT($User.ProfileId = '00e1I000000qsnN'), LOGIC_SaaS_onboarding__c = TRUE ), ISPICKVAL(Onboarding_Status__c,'Postponed'), OR( ISBLANK(TEXT(Postponed_Reason__c)), ISNULL(Postponed_Check_In__c) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Postponed Reason and Postponed Check-In fields are required.
